best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-vehicleaddition-003 title: user stops adding vehicles module: vehicle addition source pages: 1 preconditions: application is in the initial configuration state. test data: valid vehicle details. test steps: 1. select "non aggiungere un altro veicolo?". 2. select "no". expected result: the application should stop the vehicle addition process and proceed to the next step.
